listitem.para: * pdf = = (nxm) vector containing pdf for each x

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Calculates the probability distribution function of the lognormal distribution for each component of x with mean a, variance v. NOTES: The logarithm of a lognormal random deviate is normally distributed with mean = a and variance = v Could probably be improved and simplified in the line of what is made in gamma_pdf.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
